https://www.businessinsider.com/april-fed-takeaways-kevin-warsh-jerome-powell-legacy-interest-rates-2026-4
source_title: Dissents, oil shocks, and the future of the Fed: 3 takeaways from Powell's last rate decision as chair
source_summary: The FOMC held rates steady in their April meeting. It's Chair Jerome Powell's last before likely successor Kevin Warsh takes the helm.

draft_text:
Powell on the wire. The Federal Reserve has held US interest rates steady after what was expected to be Jerome Powell's final meeting as chair.

Hours after his successor Kevin Warsh won the backing of a key Senate committee to take up the role next month, Powell announced the Fed's rate would stay between 3.5% and 3.75%.

It followed continued pressure from US President Donald Trump on the Fed to lower interest rates, with the Trump having criticised Powell throughout his presidency.

The Fed kept up its 'wait and see' approach to the economic uncertainty sparked by the Iran war.

Against that backdrop, the Fed decided it was best to keep interest rates steady as it waits for clarity on how long the conflict will last – and how bad the fallout becomes.

https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62rm4zk3kgo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss
source_title: Four key takeaways from Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair
source_summary: Powell's news conference after holding rates covered the US-Israel war with Iran, inflation, legal attacks, and the Fed's independence.

If you read one thing today: The package includes 200 million super-voting shares if SpaceX hits a $7.5 trillion valuation and establishes a permanent Mars colony with at least 1 million people.

Additional 60.4 million shares are awarded if SpaceX reaches certain valuation goals and operates data centers in space delivering 100 terawatts of compute.

Musk has received a salary from SpaceX of $54,080 per year since 2019.

SpaceX's board has approved a new compensation package for Elon Musk ahead of its record-setting IPO.

Elon Musk will not receive a single share if the company fails to reach the board's valuation targets.

https://twitter.com/KobeissiLetter
source_title: SpaceX board approves Elon Musk's record compensation package ahead of IPO
